raw_consumer_statement: EVERYTHING BELOW HAS BEEN CHARGED TO MY MACYS CREDIT CARD AND I CAN NOT GET HELP CREDITING THE CARD ( s ) ... Since this time I have sent at least 3 emails to the CEO XXXX XXXX, called customer service several times 6-8, called the credit department several times 3-5 to include XX/XX/year> for 38 minutes and no one is doing anything to give me the refund back to my Macys credit card in the amount of {$170.00}. In the emails sent to Macys corporate I expressed problems with customer support and I needed help from corporate resolutions so what do I get, any email from them telling me to reach out to customer service after I told them in detail of the problems. Macys owes me a total of {$270.00} that I know of and I need to talk with someone that will go over all my credits back to the card ( s ) to make sure I am not missing anything other credits. THIS IS A REAL PROBLEM WHEN THE CEO IGNORES ALL OF THESE CONCERNS AND SENDS NO ONE TO HELP OTHER THAN TO TELL ME TO GO TO THE VERY DEPARTMENTS THAT ARE PROBLEMATIC. I have two Macys card and they are also not crediting the cards correctly, they pick at random and put a credit where ever they want. I am also getting charged interest for these mistakes. I HAVE A MACYS CREDIT CARD AND A MACYS XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, THEY ARE BOTH WRONG AS TO WHERE THE CREDITS WENT, MOSTLY TO THE REGULAR MACYS CARD.
